title: rubus subcollinus
intro: Rubus subcollinus, also known as the dwarf raspberry or wild raspberry, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant's leaves, stems, and roots possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus subcollinus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
